codeReview.summary: The fix commit correctly adds the required named offerings on Home and adds the Skinner Layne attribution on About, but it does not include the required deletion of src/pages/projects.astro in commit history.

issues.description: The prior blocking issue from page-work is not fully resolved in the fix commit: commit 80bc73a modifies only src/pages/index.astro and src/pages/about.astro. src/pages/projects.astro is still present in HEAD (git show HEAD:src/pages/projects.astro), with only an unstaged working-tree deletion (`git status --porcelain` shows ` D src/pages/projects.astro`).

sharedStateObservations.observation: Required file removals can be missed in feature commits when changes are committed narrowly to edited files, leaving deletions only in the working tree.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: For this fix run, handoff commit 80bc73a omits src/pages/projects.astro deletion (`git show --stat`), while repository state still shows an unstaged delete (`git status --porcelain` includes ` D src/pages/projects.astro`).

sharedStateObservations.observation: content-worker procedure still appears misaligned with recorded compliance: manual verification steps are not evidenced in transcript skeleton, but handoff reports followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for session 59016cd1-fe88-42bd-8bb0-af3298725aee shows build and git operations, with no interactive/manual check records; handoff skillFeedback is `{"followedProcedure": true, "deviations": []}` while SKILL.md step 8 requires manual verification.

summary: Fail. Two prior blocking issues are fixed (Home named offerings and About Skinner Layne attribution), but the required deletion of src/pages/projects.astro is still not captured in commit history and remains only as an unstaged working-tree deletion.
